class.name: E3DResourceFormatLoader
class.brief_description: Resource loader for MaSzyna E3D model files.
class.description: [E3DResourceFormatLoader] is a specialized [ResourceFormatLoader] that allows Godot's [ResourceLoader] to recognize and load [code].e3d[/code] files. When a [code].e3d[/code] file is requested, this loader uses the internal [E3DParser] to read the binary data and construct a corresponding [E3DModel] resource hierarchy. This enables native integration of MaSzyna models into the Godot editor and runtime.
